close_metadata.implementation_summary: Phase 7 (indexing/RAG) of 9-phase coderef-core pipeline rebuild. Adds CodeChunk + IndexingResult facets (layer/capability/constraints/headerStatus), ChunkConverter switched to ExportedGraph (Phase 5 canonical) with facet propagation via additive metadata copy in buildNodes. Validation gate refuses indexing on validation-report ok=false. Path A worst-severity file-grain aggregation with 0% divergence vs header_missing_count baseline (262=262). Status field replaces silent-success on chunksIndexed=0. Per-entry chunksSkippedDetails / chunksFailedDetails with reason enums. --layer / --capability filter flags on rag-search. Boundary enforcer swap (no-rag-indexing → no-phase-8-docs-leak).
commits: 63da6ae feat(rag): structural foundation - CodeChunk/IndexingResult facets + ChunkConverter + GraphBuilder propagation
385e9f8 feat(rag): validation gate + Path A facet aggregation + status field + per-entry reasons + --layer/--capability filters
1cc1380 test(rag): Phase 7 invariants, AC-01..09 coverage, boundary enforcer swap
2c02878 docs(workorder, baselines): Phase 7 workorder + closeout + validation-report baseline
